NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE COURT GRANTED DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE. THE TRIAL DATE OF 2/4/13 IS CONTINUED TO 6/24/13 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-24-2013 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-24-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Entry of Judgment.
Department 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Frank H. Kim, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff Ling Wan Wan.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant Hui Ling Peng, aka Niko Peng, Wen Jun Kang.
Plaintiff Ling Wan Wan sworn and examined through Cantonese Interpreter Edmond Liu.
Exhibit 1. Original checks given to plaintiff by defendant Hui Ling Peng. Id/Evid.
Exhibit 2. Certified copies of checks paid to Defendant Hui LIng Peng and copy of certified deposit slip. Id/Evid.
Exhibit 3. Original guarantee agreement and English translation. Id/Evid.
After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff as follows:
Damages $200,000.00
Pre-Judgment Interest at the annual rate of 10%: $151,486.88
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $505.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $351,991.88
Judgment signed in open court.
Court ordered Original Trial Exhibits returned to Plaintiff's counsel for the care and custody of the court.
